description: Assemble an existing brick in the model. If a range is specified, only elements falling in that range are activated.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('brick assemble ...') via command interface

keywords.name: id
keywords.description: ID of the brick being assembled.

keywords.name: origin
keywords.description: Position the origin of the new assembly (i.e., the lowest location of the first brick used).

keywords.name: size
keywords.description: Number of replica in the global coordinate system directions.

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: The group slot slot is set to s for the newly created bodies. If slot is not specified, then the group slot Default is set to s .
